title: KaiPlus
description: A clean and aesthetic PvP pack for all gamemodes especially crystal.
body:
# KaiPlus
**A pack made for faster and smoother gameplay.**

Almost all textures are made by me and is a work in progress resource pack,
No extra mods like Optifine are required and works in Vanilla as well as with Sodium.
The non animated version of the pack will be available in my discord server.
![Pack Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/i9t6TzqY/images/d56a0a0e81691d720608660e6b997dc741801a7c.png)
Join My discord if you have any suggestions or doubts:
[https://discord.com/invite/mtTCgN56XZ](https://discord.com/invite/mtTCgN56XZ)
